description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, black glass touchscreen that dominates the front surface. The back panel is a dark, glossy material with a subtle marbled pattern and houses a prominent triple-lens camera array in the top left corner, each lens encircled by metallic rings. The sides of the phone are a pale green metallic or anodized finish, giving it a stylish and contemporary look. The device is thin, with a slight camera bump on the back, and appears to have a solid, premium build. No visible physical buttons are present on the sides or front, suggesting a minimalist design. The phone is likely constructed from a combination of glass, metal, and internal electronic components.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large black touchscreen, pale green metallic sides, and a triple-lens camera array on a glossy, marbled back.
description_view_0: The left edge of the phone, showing its slim profile and pale green metallic finish.
description_view_1: The front view, dominated by a large black glass touchscreen with a small earpiece slot at the top.
description_view_2: The right edge of the phone, again highlighting the thinness and pale green metallic side.
description_view_3: The back view, featuring a glossy, marbled black surface and a triple-lens camera array in the top left corner.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is either turned off or in standby mode, with no visible icons, wallpaper, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: Three camera lenses arranged in a triangular pattern within a square module at the top left corner on the back, each lens encircled by a metallic ring.
